name: regression-tests
description: Single-plugin marketplace for the regression-tests multi-agent test-engineering plugin (regression-locking + TDD).

plugins.name: regression-tests
plugins.description: Multi-agent test-engineering plugin, two skills over one engine: `regression-tests` locks current behavior, `tdd` drives new features test-first (spec → red → adversarial-on-red → green → mutation) under a savepoint discipline. Coverage planning + parallel authoring + adversarial specialist team + synthesis + mutation/fuzz, run as dynamic-Workflow stages when available (else direct Agent dispatch). Eleven specialist agents + implementation-author, and a Rust CLI `regression-tests`. Supports Rust and C#.
